packageRules.description: Automerge patch and minor updates once CI passes. Majors are not matched here, so they still open PRs for manual review.
0.x minor bumps can be breaking under SemVer, so require manual review instead of automerging them. 0.x patch updates still automerge.

Hold deps with open tracking issues for manual review (never automerge). netmiko/paramiko bumps need live SSH validation that CI does not yet cover (#127); @biomejs/biome 1.9.4+ surfaces new lint findings to fix first (#107).
